---
title: "Blog personal"
subtitle: "Ensayos, pensamientos, actualizaciones sobre mi vida, y fotitos"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: "240px"
  max-description-length: 260
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
